creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/>

> Install the Quick Search plugin

The button is not effective for me with Firefox 95.0.2, I guess that it uses a deprecated approach. 

I guess, remove the button. 

----

The search engine (OpenSearch?) can be added in more modern ways, e.g. as pictured at <https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/83557/>.
